payload.intent: Reviewer infrastructure outage should not count as accept.

command:
/lead Agentic worker roster planning. Task id: agentic-eval-bridge-20260603-3b1eab94-reviewer-unavailable-revise-agentic_allowed. Run id: agentic-eval-bridge-20260603-3b1eab94-reviewer-unavailable-revise-agentic_allowed-5efe3d8cc9fe.
Plan read-only helper workers for Codex to spawn. Do not edit files and do not spawn workers yourself.
Intent:
Reviewer infrastructure outage should not count as accept.

Minimum workers: 1.
Required roles: none.
Maximum per-worker timeout: 900 seconds. Maximum per-worker budget: 1.75 USD.
Return only a short note plus <agentic_worker_roster>{...}</agentic_worker_roster> JSON. The JSON shape is {"workers":[{"worker_id":"audit-1","role":"codebase_audit","persona_id":"reviewer.codebase_audit","permission_mode":"readOnly","tool_pins":["rg","sed"],"prompt":"specific read-only task","timeout_s":300,"budget_usd":1.0}]}.

roster.prompt: Read-only audit. Verify the invariant: reviewer infrastructure outage MUST NOT count as accept. Steps: (1) rg in supervisor/ and stdio handlers for the conservative aggregator and reviewer-panel adjudication logic; locate where reviewer verdicts are classified (accept|revise|escalate|unavailable) and aggregated. (2) Identify the guard that preserves a non-accept outcome when any reviewer is classified unavailable / infra-outage / timeout / transport-error. Expected sites include supervisor/reviewer_registry.py, the conservative aggregator module, and the stdio adjudication path (~stdio:1306 / ~stdio:1331-1339 per prior memory). (3) Confirm with rg that no code path maps unavailable -> accept (search for accept assignments near unavailable, timeout, error, infra). (4) Confirm tests exist covering: single reviewer unavailable + other accept => non-accept; all reviewers unavailable => escalate or revise (never accept). Search tests/ for test names containing unavailable, outage, infra, timeout near reviewer/panel. (5) Report file:line for: the classification site, the unavailable-preserve guard, and at least one regression test. Output a short findings block with verdict ACCEPT/REVISE plus residual risks. Read-only: no edits, no git writes, no spawning sub-workers.
